---
title: "Social contagion, violence, and suicide among adolescents"
description: "Estudio sobre contagio social, violencia y suicidio entre adolescentes."
venue: "Current Opinion in Psychiatry, 36(3)"
tipo: articulo
date: "2023-01-01"
author: "Martínez, V., Jiménez-Molina, Á., Gerber, M.M."
authors: [monica-gerber]
reference: "Martínez, V., Jiménez-Molina, Á., & Gerber, M.M. (2023). Social contagion, violence, and suicide among adolescents. *Current Opinion in Psychiatry*, 36(3), 237-242."
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
    body-classes: publicacion-page
---

# Social contagion, violence, and suicide among adolescents

Estudio sobre contagio social, violencia y suicidio entre adolescentes.

**Autores OLES:** [Monica M. Gerber](../equipo/monica-gerber.html)

**Fecha:** 2023.

## Referencia sugerida

Martínez, V., Jiménez-Molina, Á., & Gerber, M.M. (2023). Social contagion, violence, and suicide among adolescents. *Current Opinion in Psychiatry*, 36(3), 237-242.

[← Volver a Publicaciones](index.qmd)
